creator: jsm@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Martin Filla from comment #2)
In my testing I got:
=> SHA256 Checksum mismatch for patches/unity_kde/unity-menubar.patch?inline=false.
===>  Giving up on fetching files:  patches/unity_kde/unity-menubar.patch?inline=false 

Please do a make makesum with unity-menubar.patch not in $distfiles/patches/unity_kde/unity-menubar.patch?inline=false

Thanks
